race.description: Nutrimate Botra Cup Discretionary Hcp Ss Pace
race.comment: STORMY VISTA NZ (7) starts 10m closer in the handicap than when he finished third last week at this circuit and distance, beaten 6 metres. Won over this trip the previous two times he raced here. Big chance. ARTFUL MAJOR (11) put the writing on the wall when runner-up from a wide barrier two back then enjoyed the switch to a standing start when successful from this mark at his most recent outing by 4.7 metres at this circuit and distance. Could back that up. BLAZE AWAY (4) switches from mobile start racing but has looked close to a win for a while, placing in four of his last five outings. LUVBITE (14) starts from a 40m handicap but was unlucky when fifth in the Winter Cup last start and was racing well prior so respect.
